requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks
- Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence: These directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
requirements.object: immediate effect

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Commercial Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
requirements.object: Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of these Directions, 'Commercial Banks' means banking
companies (other than Small Finance Banks, Payment Banks, and Local Area
Banks), corresponding new banks, and the State Bank of India, as defined
respectively under clauses (c), (da), and (nc) of Section 5 of the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949
4.
requirements.object: Small Finance Banks, Payment Banks, and Local Area Banks), corresponding new banks, and the State Bank of India, as defi

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall also follow the prudential guidelines on income recognition, asset
classification and provisioning of advances for restructured accounts as
prescribed in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Resolution of
Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025, in addition to these Directions.
requirements.object: guidelines on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning of advances for restructured accounts as prescribed

requirements.full_sentence:

processes.

compliance with the regulatory stipulations.
requirements.object: System, in compliance with the regulatory stipulations

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Calculation of provisioning requirement shall also be System based as
per pre-set rules for various categories of assets, value of security as

time to time on provisioning requirements.

requirements.object: amount required to be reversed from the income account should be obtained from the System without any manual intervention

for which the bank is liable (including in case of deposit accounts),
immediately upon a fraud being detected.

requirements.full_sentence:

and this results in the full provisioning being made in more than one
financial year, the bank shall debit 'other reserves' [i.e., reserves other
than the one created in terms of Section 17(2) of the Banking Regulation
Act 1949] by the amount remaining un-provided at the end of the financial
year by credit to provisions.

However, the bank shall proportionately
reverse the debits to 'other reserves' and complete the provisioning by
debiting profit and loss account, in the subsequent quarters of the next
financial year.
